name: vri-msme-credit-scoring
description: AI-powered MSME credit scoring using GST data, XGBoost, and Claude

scripts.dev:backend: cd demo/backend && python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt && uvicorn src.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
